column1: # GLORi EVANGELIST COMP — ROLLING-BOOK MULTI-YEAR SCENARIO MODEL (Model D LOCKED 2026-07-21). DRAFT / source text for review; not legal or tax advice — confirm with counsel.
# ASSUMPTIONS (all grounded in COMP-PLAN-MODEL-D.md; no invented figures):
# Rate: 20% of MRR on an account's months 1-12 (new-account commission); then 5% residual on months 13-60 (years 2-5). Both employed-only; no clawback of paid amounts. 5-year per-account cap.
# Residual GATE: a rep earns 5% residual in a year ONLY if they produced >=50 new accounts that year (re-qualify annually). Both reps below clear the gate every year (100>=50 and 50>=50)
column2: so residual accrues in full each year.

column1: # Per-account year-1 commission (20% x MRR x 12): Starter $240 / Growth $960 / Pro $2400. Per-account residual per year (5% x MRR x 12): Starter $60 / Growth $240 / Pro $600.
# Mix: 100/yr rep = 25 Starter / 50 Growth / 25 Pro (exact 25/50/25). 50/yr rep = 13 Starter / 25 Growth / 12 Pro (~25/50/25; Growth held at 50%).

# Rolling book: rep adds one fresh cohort every year. A cohort pays 20% in its production year and 5% residual in each of the following 4 years; residual stacks as cohorts accumulate. Fully-ramped upper bound (all accounts live a full year; a real ramp lands lower). Assumes full 5-year retention and no attrition.

column4: year-1 only): $1000 at 10 sites in month 1; $2500 at 25 in 3 months; $10000 at 100 in 12 months = $13500. 100/yr rep is modeled hitting all three (per Model D headline). 50/yr rep at even ~1-per-week pace is modeled hitting none ($0); a front-loaded 50/yr rep could earn up to $3500 (Fast Start + Quarter) but never the $10000 Year bonus. NO base
